description.value: You constantly accumulate knowledge about philosophies and multiversal understanding. During your daily preparations, you can call upon that knowledge and gain the trained proficiency rank in two Lore skills of your choice related to philosophies, religions, or the cosmos. You might select something like Abaddon Lore and Prophecies of Kalistrade Lore or Pharasma Lore and Boneyard Lore. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.
